prediction.chief_complaint: smoking cessation counseling, patient motivated to quit

medications.name: varenicline
medications.frequency: once daily for days 1-3, then 0.5 mg twice daily for days 4-7, then 1 mg twice daily starting day 8 for a total of 12 weeks

diagnoses.description: tobacco use disorder, patient motivated to quit

plan: Start varenicline 0.5 mg once daily on day 1-3, then increase to 0.5 mg twice daily on day 4-7, then 1 mg twice daily starting day 8 for a total of 12 weeks
Begin varenicline 1 week before chosen quit date
Take varenicline with food and a full glass of water to minimize nausea
Monitor for mood changes and report unusual symptoms
Choose a specific quit date within the next 2 weeks
Identify and plan to avoid usual smoking triggers
Use substitutes such as gum, walking, or deep breathing exercises when cravings occur

follow_up.reason: smoking cessation follow-up; sooner if experiencing side effects
